properties.description: Description of this distribution, e.g. what format, access constraints, etc.
MIME type with extension; should indicate the serialization scheme in sufficient detail that machine can know how to parse.
A string value calculated from the content of the resource representation, used to test if content has been modified. The checksum is a property of a particular distribution/DataDownload.
An identifier for a standard or specification that the distribution conforms to. Recommended to enable machine-actionable data access.
Party who maintains this particular distribution option for the dataset. Use this property if there are multiple distributions from different providers
string label for person that is meaningful for human users
identifier for person, recommend ORCID
other labels by which the person might be known
if affiliation is present, value must be a schema:Organization.
string label for organization that is meaningful for human users
other labels by which the organization might be known
identifier for organization
other identifiers for the organization
restrict to email only. Schema.org allows telephone and postal contacts as well
other identifiers for the person
string label for organization that is meaningful for human users
other labels by which the organization might be known
identifier for organization
other identifiers for the organization
A representative code for this keyword in the controlled vocabulary (Optional).  Analogous to skos:Notation
Identifier for the controlled vocabulary responsible for this keyword.
In this context for the schema:PropertyValue, this field is an identifier for the identifier schema, e.g. DOI, ARK.  Get values from https://registry.identifiers.org/registry/ for interoperability
the identifier string. E.g. 10.5066/F7VX0DMQ
web-resolveable string for the identifier; host name part is location of a resolver that will return some representation for the given identifier value. E.g. https://doi.org/10.5066/F7VX0DMQ
